requirements.summary: Keep the KopdeGoa logo exactly as it currently appears in the Header, Hero, and Footer components — do not alter its size, styling, transparency, positioning, or any other visual properties
acceptanceCriteria: The logo in the Header component renders identically to the current approved state
The logo in the Hero component renders identically to the current approved state
The logo in the Footer component renders identically to the current approved state
No changes are made to logo size, opacity, padding, margin, background, or wrapper elements

file_operations.description: Verify the logo implementation in Header.tsx matches the approved state: using frontend/public/assets/generated/kopde-goa-logo-transparent.dim_200x200.png with h-8 w-auto sizing and no modifications to the existing img element or its wrapper. No changes should be made; this is a verification-only step to ensure the logo remains unchanged.

Verify the logo implementation in Hero.tsx matches the approved state: using frontend/public/assets/generated/kopde-goa-logo-transparent.dim_200x200.png with h-32 w-auto sizing and mb-6 spacing. No changes should be made; this is a verification-only step to ensure the logo remains unchanged.

Verify the logo implementation in Footer.tsx matches the approved state: using frontend/public/assets/generated/kopde-goa-logo-transparent.dim_200x200.png with h-12 w-auto sizing. No changes should be made; this is a verification-only step to ensure the logo remains unchanged.
